pageSubtitle: Company-wide rules that decide what is allowed and what needs approval across sales, purchases, and the till.
toastSaveError: Failed to save controls and policies.
toastLoadError: Failed to load controls and policies.

empty.title: No rules yet
empty.description: Add a rule to set who can do what and when it needs approval. Rules with no override work alongside your existing module settings.

fields.requireApprovalAbove: Only require approval above this amount

companyMatrixSubtitle: These rules apply across every area. Add rules for a specific area (Sales, Purchases, or the till) from that area's own Controls screen.
moduleMatrixSubtitle: Only the rules that belong to {{module}}. Company-wide rules are managed from Company Settings.

confirmRemove.title: Remove this rule?
confirmRemove.message: This control will stop applying. You can always add it again.

validator.idRequired: A short id is required so this rule can be audited.
validator.amountOpRequired: Choose a comparison for the amount condition.
